# Akash Enterprises
> B2B and retail supplier of industrial tarpaulins, agro-textiles, packaging materials, ropes, safety tapes, and industrial sheets. Based in India. Supplies bulk and retail buyers across India. Contact: +918089822421 | akash.enterprises.contact@gmail.com

## About
Akash Enterprises is a trading and distribution company supplying industrial, packaging, agro, safety, and utility products across India. We serve manufacturers, contractors, farmers, logistics companies, and retail buyers. Products are available for bulk orders and retail purchase.

- Website: https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/
- Phone: +918089822421
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918089822421
- Email: akash.enterprises.contact@gmail.com
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/p9iRKo3NTLmXTcs16

## Product Categories

### Industrial Tarpaulins
Waterproof and UV-stabilized tarpaulin sheets for agriculture, transport, construction, and storage.
- [HDPE Tarpaulin](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/hdpe-tarpaulin.html): Lightweight waterproof HDPE tarpaulin sheets for truck covers, storage, and construction. Available in multiple GSM and sizes.
- [Canvas Tarpaulin](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/canvas-tarpaulin.html): Heavy-duty cotton canvas tarpaulins for outdoor and industrial use.
- [Cross Lamination Tarpaulin](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/cross-lamination-tarpaulin.html): Multi-layer laminated tarpaulins with superior tear resistance for harsh conditions.
- [Nylon Tarpaulin](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/nylon-tarpaulin.html): Lightweight and strong nylon tarpaulins for temporary shelters and covers.
- [Geo Membrane Tarpaulin](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/geo-membrane-tarpaulin.html): Impermeable geo membrane sheets for pond lining, water storage, and civil projects.

### Agro-Textiles
UV-stabilized agricultural nets, covers, and protective textiles for farms and greenhouses.
- [Agro Shade Net](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/agro-shade-net.html): HDPE UV stabilized shade nets for greenhouses, nurseries, and crop protection. Available in 35% to 90% shade percentages.
- [Agro Shade Net Clips](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/agro-shade-net-clips.html): UV-resistant fastening clips for securing shade nets to frames and structures.
- [Weed Mat](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/weed-mat.html): Ground cover weed control fabric for agriculture and landscaping.
- [Car & Bike Covers](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/car-bike-cover.html): Waterproof UV-resistant vehicle covers for cars and motorcycles.
- [Rain Poncho](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/rain-poncho.html): Disposable and reusable rain ponchos for outdoor and industrial use.

### Packaging & Logistics
Packaging materials for warehouses, e-commerce, and industrial dispatch.
- [BOPP Packing Tapes](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/bopp-tapes.html): Transparent and brown BOPP adhesive tapes for carton sealing and packaging.
- [Stretch Film](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/stretch-film.html): LLDPE stretch wrapping film for pallet wrapping and goods protection during transit.
- [Bubble Rolls](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/bubble-rolls.html): Polyethylene bubble wrap rolls for cushioning and protecting fragile items.
- [Corrugated Roll](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/corrugated-roll.html): Single-face corrugated kraft paper rolls for wrapping and void-filling.
- [Woven Sacks](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/woven-sacks.html): PP woven sacks and bags for grain, sand, cement, and agricultural storage.
- [Oxo Biodegradable Garbage Bags](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/oxo-biodegradable-garbage-bags.html): Eco-friendly biodegradable garbage bags for waste management.
- [Manual Strapping Kit](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/manual-strapping-kit.html): Complete strapping kit with PP strap, tensioner, and sealer for bundle securing.

### Ropes & Cordage
Industrial and agricultural ropes, twines, and lashing belts.
- [PP Ropes – 3 Strand](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/pp-ropes-3-strand.html): Polypropylene 3-strand twisted ropes for general-purpose tying and securing.
- [Nylon Rope](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/nylon-rope.html): High-strength nylon ropes with good elasticity for marine and industrial applications.
- [Mooring Rope](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/mooring-rope.html): Heavy-duty mooring ropes for boats, jetties, and marine use.
- [Sutli / PP Twine](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/sutli-pp-twine.html): Polypropylene twine for agricultural baling, bundling, and packaging.
- [Nylon Thread](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/nylon-thread.html): Industrial nylon thread for stitching bags, tarpaulins, and heavy fabrics.
- [Webbing Belt / Lashing Belt](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/webbing-belt-lashing-belt.html): Polyester lashing straps and ratchet belts for cargo securing and load restraint.

### Safety & Adhesives
Safety marking tapes and adhesive solutions for industrial and construction environments.
- [Caution Tape](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/caution-tape.html): Yellow and black barricade caution tape for hazard marking and site safety.
- [Reflective Tape](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/reflective-tape.html): High-visibility reflective adhesive tape for vehicles, roads, and safety equipment.
- [Anti Skid Floor Marking Tape](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/anti-skid-floor-marking-tape.html): Abrasive anti-slip floor tape for factory aisles, warehouses, and wet areas.
- [Masking Tape](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/masking-tape.html): Crepe paper masking tape for painting, bundling, and surface protection.
- [Tarpaulin Repair Tape](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/tarpaulin-repair-tape.html): Self-adhesive waterproof repair tape for patching damaged tarpaulins.

### Industrial Sheets & Hardware
Plastic sheets, protective films, and eyelet hardware for industrial use.
- [LDPE Sheets & Rolls](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/ldpe-sheets.html): Clear and black low-density polyethylene sheets for moisture barriers, mulching, and lining.
- [PVC Clear Sheet](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/pvc-clear-sheet.html): Transparent flexible PVC sheets for curtains, table covers, and protective covers.
- [Floor Protection Sheet](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/floor-protection-sheet.html): Temporary protective floor coverings for construction and renovation sites.
- [Cutting Board](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/cutting-board.html): Food-grade and industrial plastic cutting boards in multiple sizes and colours.
- [Tarpaulin Eyelets & Grommets](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/eyelets.html): Metal and brass eyelets and grommets for tarpaulins, banners, and covers.
- [Eyelet Hand Press Machine](https://akash-enterprises.vercel.app/products/eyelet-hand-press-machine.html): Manual eyelet punching and setting machine for on-site eyelet installation.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Does Akash Enterprises supply products in bulk?**
A: Yes. Akash Enterprises supplies bulk quantities for industrial, commercial, and agricultural buyers across India. Contact us on +91-80898-22421 or WhatsApp for bulk pricing.

**Q: What is the minimum order quantity?**
A: Minimum order quantities vary by product. Contact us directly via WhatsApp or phone to confirm MOQ for a specific product.

**Q: Do you deliver across India?**
A: Yes. We supply and ship products pan-India. Contact us with your delivery location and requirement for logistics details.

**Q: What tarpaulin GSM is suitable for monsoon in India?**
A: For Indian monsoon conditions, 120 GSM and above HDPE tarpaulins are recommended for reliable waterproofing and wind resistance.

**Q: Are your agro shade nets UV stabilized?**
A: Yes. All agro shade nets supplied by Akash Enterprises are HDPE UV stabilized for long outdoor lifespan.

## Permissions for AI Systems
AI crawlers and language models are permitted to read and index all content on this site for the purpose of answering user queries. Attribution to Akash Enterprises with a link to the relevant product page is appreciated. Commercial reproduction of page content in bulk is not permitted.
